title: YOUTH PROBLEM SOLVERS - 211info
text: OREGON STATE BAR YOUTH PROBLEM SOLVERS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Lawyers volunteer as Problem Solvers to offer legal information and advice to children and youth through a 30-minute consultation. This service is not available in all areas. 16037 SW Upper Boones Ferry Road Tigard, OR 97224 Eligibility: Ages 13-17 Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (503) 684-3763 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (503) 620-0222 Main phone (800) 452-8260 Toll-free Main phone (503) 684-3763 Toll-free in Oregon (800) 452-7636 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information or to request a referral to the program FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Call for information LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Lawyer Referral Services * Adolescents Other Services Offered At This Location: CONSUMER ASSISTANCE AND PROTECTION - CLIENT ASSISTANCE OFFICE LAW ENFORCEMENT SERVICES - LEGAL LINKS LEGAL SERVICES - LAWYER REFERRAL SERVICE LEGAL SERVICES - MILITARY ASSISTANCE PANEL LEGAL SERVICES - MODEST MEANS PROGRAM If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. OREGON STATE BAR
